# hetzner-robot_rdns (Resource)

Manages a reverse DNS (PTR) entry for a Hetzner IP address (`POST` / `DELETE /rdns/{ip}`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hetzner-robot_rdns" "node" {
  ip  = "1.2.3.4"
  ptr = "node1.k8s.example.com"
}
```

Import an existing entry by IP:

```shell
terraform import hetzner-robot_rdns.node 1.2.3.4
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) IP address
- `ptr` (String) PTR record (hostname)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
